## BaseIdTogglePanelButton.updatePanelState() method

The subscription to the [XEventsTypes.TogglePanelStateChanged](./x-components.xeventstypes.togglepanelstatechanged.md) event to update the `isPanelOpen` property.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
updatePanelState(newState: boolean, { id }: WireMetadata): void;
```

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  newState | boolean | The new isOpen state of the panel. |
